message:
fix(codegen): Add struct slicing support for sys.version_info

- Add .toArray() method to VersionInfo in sys.zig for slicing support
- Detect version_info slicing in subscript.zig and emit .toArray()[...]
- Change sys_mod.zig to reference sys.version_info instead of inline struct
- Add _ = __alloc; discards to prevent unused parameter errors
- Fix nodeReferencesAnyName to use anytype and correct AST field names
- Add StringHashSet type to hashmap_helper.zig
- Remove duplicate iter export from builtins.zig

This fixes Python expressions like sys.version_info[:2] which previously
failed with "slice of non-array type VersionInfo" error.
